[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a split-screen style composition with a small inset video of a smiling man on the left and a stylized anime-style girl portrait occupying most of the right side.

The main visual focus on the right is the anime-style face of a girl with pale skin, closed or lowered eyes with prominent black lashes, a small closed-mouth smile, and long straight black hair with blunt bangs that cast shadows over the upper face. The character wears a black choker with a small dark detail at the center, and the upper portion of clothing includes a dark collar and layered clothing edges in gray-black tones. On the left side inset, a man appears in a close-up view wearing large over-ear black headphones and a dark top, with his head slightly tilted and a broad smile.

The setting is unclear for both parts; the inset looks like an indoor camera view with a neutral background, while the right side appears to be a digital illustration or screen graphic. Lighting is soft and even in the inset, while the illustration has flat, clean shading with high-contrast linework.

No important visible text detected.

Overall, the image combines a live-action-looking inset of a smiling man wearing headphones with a large digital anime-style portrait of a black-haired girl. The composition is tightly framed on the faces and upper shoulders, with the right side dominated by the character’s expression and hair.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
